items.title: Palantir joins the wave of businesses and billionaires moving to Florida
items.description: Some experts say Florida’s more business-friendly policies are helping the state attract more corporations.

items.title: ‘I’m close to retiring’: I’m behind on my property tax. Is this a really bad time to sell my house?
items.description: “I’ve never been late on a mortgage, so this makes me nervous.”

items.title: ‘Am I crazy?’ My boyfriend’s parents say he shouldn’t marry me until he earns $50K a year. Who is to blame here?
items.description: “Am I crazy, or are these ‘real’ concerns from his parents?”

items.title: ‘It’s a life-changing sum’: Can I stop my kids from using their inheritance to support political causes I vehemently oppose?
items.description: ”I would hate for our money to end up in the hands of organizations that oppose everything we have supported throughout our lives.”

items.title: ‘I have a moral and ethical conundrum’: My husband was killed by a careless driver. I received $2 million. What do I owe my stepdaughter?
items.description: “As the children grew, life became more complicated.”
